title: Coordinator pre-positioning: Secret Creeping Moth -> Scorched (owner-directed immediate transfer)
body:
PDR-064 Moment 1 — Coordinator pre-positioning. Information transfer only. Routing authority remains with Secret Creeping Moth until Scorched broadcasts Moment 2 active-acknowledgement. Owner-directed immediate transfer (~13:44Z chat-direction): 'Effective immediately Scorched is Director. Tell them what they need to know.' Substrate-pointer shape per PDR-075 candidate discipline: comms stream is canonical record; this event is the thin pointer.

**Outgoing coordinator**: Secret Creeping Moth / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 61d726
**Incoming coordinator**: Scorched (full tuple to be declared on team-start)

**Lineage chain**: Seaworthy -> Velvet (~10:48Z) -> Seaworthy-acting (~11:30Z) -> Seaworthy-official (12:09Z) -> Abyssal (12:11Z) -> Incandescent (12:52Z) -> Secret (13:27:29Z) -> **Scorched (this handoff)**. Seventh Director; sixth role-transition.

**Substrate priority pointer for incoming Director bootstrap** (read these in order; PDR-075 discipline working — no comprehensive handoff record follows):
1. **56b51598** (Incandescent broadcast 13:18Z) — Metacognition reframe: Director is context-allocation + substrate-writing discipline. behaviour-note. Foundational.
2. **02fa64cf** (Incandescent broadcast 13:20Z) — Recursion-of-doctrine 4th worked instance + Director-self-catch cure-shape. failure-mode + behaviour-note.
3. **5fbf6f92** (Incandescent broadcast 13:25:53Z) — Moment 1 Incandescent -> Secret. Lineage substrate.
4. **bd6ebd33** (Secret broadcast 13:27:29Z) — Moment 2 Secret active.
5. **d718be8c** (Secret broadcast 13:38:12Z) — Coherence-moment fire on cure-bundle-v2 landing.
6. **a485fae2** (Incandescent broadcast 13:38:49Z) — pnpm check RED at HEAD 86f340b5; standing-rule blocker. LOAD-BEARING for current state.
7. **5ead4a4f** (Secret broadcast 13:40:04Z) — Director tick #3: marshal queue PAUSED at tree-not-green; surfacing to owner.
8. **5b8a4050** (Secret broadcast 13:42:01Z) — Owner verdict investigate-first absorbed; Ferny routed.

**In-flight directed events** (for live state):
- **818be9e9** (Secret -> Ferny 13:41:50Z) — Investigation brief: read error-context.md + tests/visual/landing-page.spec.ts:44; classify root cause as flaky-snapshot/genuine-regression/long-standing-unmaintained; subagent dispatch authorised; surface findings to me with cure-vs-accept verdict-recommendation. Time bound 15-20 min from 13:41:50Z (i.e., expected ~14:00-14:05Z).
- **d20046c2** (Secret -> Ferny 13:39:52Z) — Earlier PAUSE directive (now superseded by 818be9e9 routing).

**Team roster at handoff**:
- **Active**: Ferny Fruiting Root (claude/ee16a4) — investigating per 818be9e9; protection-claim on agent-tools/tests/commit-workflow.unit.test.ts (expires 14:08:57Z); Seaworthy Navigating Beacon (claude/6966d4) — commit marshal, monitors armed, marshal-standby tree-not-green; Incandescent Kindling Forge (cursor/328fac) — INDEPENDENT consolidate-docs report lane owner-directed; NOT me-routable; address by tuple per PDR-027.
- **Closing/closed**: Twilit Scattering Twilight (8d8d93) - closed clean 13:36:31Z; Twilit Weaving Moon (b47890) - closed 13:32:52Z with PDR-075 claim 5fe22969 retained for marshal handoff; Incandescent Banking Flame (aa986e) - session-handoff Step 11 blocked at red, effectively standby.

**Single highest-priority action for incoming Director**: absorb Ferny investigation classification when it surfaces (~14:00-14:05Z) and surface to owner for cure-vs-accept verdict. Marshal queue remains PAUSED at tree-not-green; standing rule all-quality-gates-blocking-always honoured (no rationalisation as pre-existing-out-of-scope). HEAD is 86f340b5. Cure-bundle-v2 (FM-2 Monitor-harness liveness cure) landed cleanly via Seaworthy at 13:35:11Z; pnpm check broader-gate (108 tasks vs husky 90) revealed 4 pre-existing-red in apps/oak-curriculum-mcp-streamable-http widget/a11y tests.

**Orphaned items needing Scorched routing** (after current investigation lane discharges):
- 3 Sonar S6564 ACCEPTED dispositions (issue keys + rationale in event 36b1c37d Incandescent -> Pearly; Pearly closed before seeing; Gnarled MCP gateway blocked); needs Sonar-MCP-capable session.
- Queue tail orphan-claim absorption: Pearly S7735 (Ferny took over claim — 03f5233b expired; Ferny's claim on commit-workflow.unit.test.ts), Zephyrous S5443 (no retained-claim), Zephyrous ADR-185 v2 (no retained-claim), PDR-075 (Twilit WM retained 5fe22969). All blocked at tree-not-green.

**Open owner-decision items** (carried forward from Abyssal handoff, still unsurfaced):
- §6.15 sha-prefix adapter write-path verdict
- F-class queue F2 verdict

**Cron + monitor state**:
- My cron 117b15ea (3-58/5 * * * *, 5-consecutive-idle exit) continues through this Moment 1; will CronDelete at Scorched's Moment 2 per PDR-064 cadence-boundary rule.
- My all-channels comms watcher b1kpdyyo0 ends with my session.
- Scorched arms their own cron at Moment 2.

**Operating-context reminders** (delta from Incandescent handoff):
- All quality gates blocking always (recurring this session; current pnpm-check-red is direct application).
- husky pre-commit (90 tasks) is a strict subset of pnpm check (108 tasks); 18-task delta is the a11y/visual/widget surface. Substrate observation Ferny named; will be failure-mode tagged event when Ferny has moment.
- Substrate-writing discipline per 56b51598: Director-default behaviour; tagged events at coherence-moments.
- Context-allocation discipline per 56b51598: route, do not self-execute.

Standing by for Scorched's Moment 2 active-acknowledgement (conventional title 'Coordinator role acknowledgement: Scorched from Secret Creeping Moth', referencing this event via in_response_to or body cite).

— Secret Creeping Moth / claude / 61d726 (outgoing Director, Moment 1)
